<script>
(function(){
var NS='__MMS6_APP__';
var STORE_KEY='mms6_memory_state_v3_stable';
var OLD_KEYS=['mms6_memory_state_v2_official','mms6_memory_state_v1','mms5_memory_state_v2','mms3_memory_state_v1'];
var LOCK='__MMS6_CORE_LOCK__';
var CORE_RETRY_MAX=80;
var CORE_RETRY_MS=120;

function bootCore(retry){
  retry=retry||0;

  function getSharedNS(){
  try{
    if(window.top){
      window.top[NS]=window.top[NS]||{};
      return window.top[NS];
    }
  }catch(_){}
  window[NS]=window[NS]||{};
  return window[NS];
}
var ns=getSharedNS();
var shell=ns.shell;


  if(!shell||!shell.__ready){
    if(retry<CORE_RETRY_MAX){
      setTimeout(function(){ bootCore(retry+1); }, CORE_RETRY_MS);
      return;
    }
    console.warn('[MMS6-Core] Shell 未就绪，已放弃启动');
    return;
  }

  if(ns.core&&ns.core.__ready){
    try{ns.core.notifyFreshInstance()}catch(_){}
    return;
  }

  var lockHost;
try{ lockHost=window.top||window; }catch(_){ lockHost=window; }
if(!lockHost[LOCK]) lockHost[LOCK]={busy:false,owner:''};
var globalLock=lockHost[LOCK];


  function trim(t){return String(t==null?'':t).replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g,'')}
  function arr(v){return Object.prototype.toString.call(v)==='[object Array]'}
  function int(v,d){v=parseInt(v,10);return isNaN(v)?d:v}
  function num(v,d){v=parseFloat(v);return isNaN(v)?d:v}
  function esc(t){return String(t==null?'':t).replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/</g,'<').replace(/>/g,'>').replace(/"/g,'"').replace(/'/g,''')}
  function clip(t,n){t=trim(String(t==null?'':t)).replace(/\n{3,}/g,'\n\n');return !n||t.length<=n?t:trim(t.slice(0,n))+'…'}
  function rep(t,a,b){return String(t==null?'':t).split(a).join(String(b==null?'':b))}
  function clean(t){
    t=trim(String(t==null?'':t));
    if(t.indexOf('```')===0&&t.lastIndexOf('```')===t.length-3){
      t=t.replace(/^```[a-zA-Z]*\n?/,'').replace(/```$/,'');
    }
    return trim(t);
  }
  function ferr(e){
    try{
      if(!e)return'未知错误';
      if(typeof e==='string')return e;
      if(e.message)return String(e.message);
      return String(e);
    }catch(_){return'未知错误'}
  }
  function now(){try{return new Date().toLocaleString()}catch(_){return''}}
  function uid(){return'm'+Date.now().toString(36)+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,8)}
  function lower(t){return trim(String(t||'')).toLowerCase()}
  function q(sel){return shell.root?shell.root.querySelector(sel):null}
  function qa(sel){return shell.root?shell.root.querySelectorAll(sel):[]}
  function closest(el,sel){while(el){if(el.matches&&el.matches(sel))return el;el=el.parentElement}return null}
  function toast(t){
    try{
      if(shell&&typeof shell.showToast==='function')shell.showToast(t);
      else if(window.tavo&&tavo.utils&&typeof tavo.utils.toast==='function')tavo.utils.toast(t);
    }catch(_){}
  }
    function acquire(owner){
    owner=trim(owner||'core');
    if(globalLock.busy)return false;
    globalLock.busy=true;
    globalLock.owner=owner;
    return true;
  }
  function release(owner){
    owner=trim(owner||'core');
    if(globalLock.owner===owner){
      globalLock.busy=false;
      globalLock.owner='';
    }
  }

  function markUnsynced(state,reason){
    state.unsynced=true;
    state.unsyncedReason=trim(reason||'有未同步改动');
    return state;
  }
  function rangeLabelL(a,b){
    a=Math.max(0,int(a,0));
    b=Math.max(0,int(b,0));
    if(a&&b)return a===b?(b+'L'):(a+'L-'+b+'L');
    if(b)return b+'L';
    if(a)return a+'L';
    return'暂无';
  }

  function stageTitles(){return['【时间线】','【这一段发生的事（主干）】','【次要事件/过渡信息】','【新确认的信息】','【关系/态度变化】','【还在继续的事】','【锚点】']}
  function longTitles(){return['【时间线】','【核心事件轴】','【关键人物/物品/设定】','【关系演进记录】','【高价值台词/细节钩子】','【未决事项】','【重要锚点】']}
  function historyTitles(){return['【时间线】','【这一段核心变化】','【该段末状态】','【以后可能再提到的细节】','【锚点】']}

  function firstLine(block){
    var lines=String(block||'').split(/\r?\n/),i,x;
    for(i=0;i<lines.length;i++){
      x=trim(lines[i]).replace(/^[-•·\d\.\)\(]+\s*/,'');
      if(!x||x==='-'||x==='—'||x==='无'||x==='暂无'||x==='暂无明确变化')continue;
      return x;
    }
    return'';
  }

  function section(text,title,titles){
    text=String(text||'');
    titles=arr(titles)?titles:[];
    var s=text.indexOf(title);
    if(s<0)return'';
    s+=title.length;
    var e=text.length,i,t,x;
    for(i=0;i<titles.length;i++){
      t=titles[i];
      if(t===title)continue;
      x=text.indexOf(t,s);
      if(x>=0&&x<e)e=x;
    }
    return trim(text.slice(s,e));
  }

  function extractBullets(block){
    var lines=String(block||'').split(/\r?\n/),out=[],i,x;
    for(i=0;i<lines.length;i++){
      x=trim(lines[i]);
      if(!x)continue;
      x=x.replace(/^[-•·]\s*/,'').replace(/^\d+[\.\)]\s*/,'');
      x=trim(x);
      if(!x||x==='无'||x==='暂无'||x==='暂无明确变化')continue;
      out.push(x);
    }
    if(!out.length){
      block=trim(String(block||''));
      if(block&&block!=='无'&&block!=='暂无')out.push(block);
    }
    return out;
  }

  function normalizeAnchors(list){
    list=arr(list)?list:[];
    var out=[],seen={},i,x,k;
    for(i=0;i<list.length;i++){
      x=clip(trim(String(list[i]||'')).replace(/[：:]+$/,''),40);
      if(!x)continue;
      k=lower(x);
      if(seen[k])continue;
      seen[k]=1;
      out.push(x);
      if(out.length>=8)break;
    }
    if(!out.length)out=['当前段落关键节点'];
    return out;
  }

  function extractAnchorsFromText(text){
    text=String(text||'');
    var block=section(text,'【锚点】',stageTitles())||
              section(text,'【重要锚点】',longTitles())||
              section(text,'【锚点】',historyTitles());
    var out=extractBullets(block);
    if(!out.length){
      out=
        extractBullets(section(text,'【这一段发生的事（主干）】',stageTitles()))
        .concat(extractBullets(section(text,'【核心事件轴】',longTitles())))
        .concat(extractBullets(section(text,'【这一段核心变化】',historyTitles())));
    }
    return normalizeAnchors(out);
  }

  function stagePreview(t){
    var x=firstLine(section(t,'【这一段发生的事（主干）】',stageTitles()));
    if(!x)x=firstLine(section(t,'【次要事件/过渡信息】',stageTitles()));
    return x||'（无预览）';
  }
  function longPreview(t){
    var x=firstLine(section(t,'【核心事件轴】',longTitles()));
    if(!x)x=firstLine(section(t,'【未决事项】',longTitles()));
    return x||'（无预览）';
  }
  function historyPreview(t){
    var x=firstLine(section(t,'【这一段核心变化】',historyTitles()));
    if(!x)x=firstLine(section(t,'【该段末状态】',historyTitles()));
    return x||'（无预览）';
  }

  function defaultStagePrompt(){
    return [
      '你是对话“阶段总结器”。仅根据【原文对话】输出当前窗口的事实记录。禁止补写、推测、引用窗口外内容。',
      '',
      '对话双方：{{CHAR_NAME}}（角色）、{{USER_NAME}}（用户）',
      '',
      '必须完整输出以下结构：',
      '',
      '【时间线】',
      '- {{FLOOR_RANGE}}',
      '',
      '【这一段发生的事（主干）】',
      '- 格式：「在[时间锚/场景]，[角色]因[前因]做了[具体动作]，导致[直接结果/对方反应]。」',
      '- 上限3条，选取本段最可能被后续引用的核心事件。',
      '',
      '【次要事件/过渡信息】',
      '- 列出本段有剧情意义但非核心转折的事件，每条≤15字。无则写“无”。',
      '',
      '【新确认的信息】',
      '- 仅列本段首次揭露的世界观、设定、角色背景、物品或人物线索。无则写“无”。',
      '',
      '【关系/态度变化】',
      '- 格式：「[角色]对[对象]因[事件]表现出[态度]，依据：[动作/台词]。」',
      '- 无明确信号则写“暂无明确变化”。',
      '',
      '【还在继续的事】',
      '- 悬停场景、中断动作、未闭环话题。无则写“无”。',
      '',
      '【锚点】',
      '- 3-6个关键词，如：`蓝瓶` `天台约定` `拒绝回答`。',
      '',
      '原文对话：',
      '{{DIALOGUE}}'
    ].join('\n');
  }

  function defaultLongPrompt(){
    return [
      '你是对话“长期记忆整理器”。仅根据下方【阶段总结】生成高密度长期记忆。禁止编造。',
      '',
      '对话双方：{{CHAR_NAME}}、{{USER_NAME}}',
      '',
      '必须完整输出以下结构：',
      '',
      '【时间线】',
      '- {{FLOOR_RANGE}}',
      '',
      '【核心事件轴】',
      '- 格式：「[约 XL-YL] [角色]因[前因]做了[具体行为]，导致[后果/反应]。」',
      '- 按时间顺序列出所有对剧情有实质推进的事件，条数不限。',
      '',
      '【关键人物/物品/设定】',
      '- 格式：「[名称/类型]：[状态/归属/已知信息]，首现/变化于约 XL-YL。」',
      '- 本段新出场或状态变化的人物、物品、世界观设定。无则写“无”。',
      '',
      '【关系演进记录】',
      '- 本段初期：[状态及文本依据]',
      '- 转折点（约 XL-YL）：[因何事变化]',
      '- 本段末期：[状态及文本依据]',
      '- 若无变化，写「本段关系状态稳定：[具体描述]」。',
      '',
      '【高价值台词/细节钩子】',
      '- 格式：「[约 XL] [角色]说/做了[具体内容]」',
      '- 记录未来可能被callback的台词、动作、约定、线索。无则写“无”。',
      '',
      '【未决事项】',
      '- 格式：「[约 XL] [未决内容]，当前状态：[悬停状态]。」',
      '- 本段末未解决的承诺、疑问、冲突。无则写“无”。',
      '',
      '【重要锚点】',
      '- 6-10个关键词，如：`银柄匕首` `老周的警告` `三天之约` `“你不该来”`。',
      '',
      '阶段总结：',
      '{{STAGE_SUMMARIES}}'
    ].join('\n');
  }

  function defaultHistoryPrompt(){
    return [
      '你是对话“历史补档整理器”。仅根据【原文对话】生成一条历史补档。禁止补写。',
      '',
      '对话双方：{{CHAR_NAME}}、{{USER_NAME}}',
      '',
      '必须完整输出以下结构：',
      '',
      '【时间线】',
      '- {{FLOOR_RANGE}}',
      '',
      '【这一段核心变化】',
      '- 格式：「在[L数/场景]，[角色]因[触发原因]而[具体行为]，导致[后果/反应]。」',
      '- 2-4条本段对剧情走向有实质推进的事件。',
      '',
      '【该段末状态】',
      '- 位置与场景：[描述]',
      '- 角色显性情绪：[{{CHAR_NAME}}与{{USER_NAME}}各自可观察的情绪]',
      '- 关键物品状态：[重要物品的归属或状态]',
      '',
      '【以后可能再提到的细节】',
      '- 每条≤20字，列出本段短期未解决但可能被callback的线索。无则写“无”。',
      '',
      '【锚点】',
      '- 3-5个关键词，优先物品、地名、代称、事件代号。',
      '',
      '原文对话：',
      '{{DIALOGUE}}'
    ].join('\n');
  }

    function defState(){
    return {
      schemaVersion:9,
      boundChatId:'',
      started:false,
      stageEveryL:24,
      longEveryStage:4,
      recentStageCount:3,
      longInjectionMode:'all',
      longInjectionCount:6,
      scanMemoryDetails:false,
      scanMemoryLimit:3,
      scanMemoryHoldRounds:2,
      coarseTargetL:100,
      coarseMinL:40,
      coarseMaxL:140,
      liveBaselineAssistantCount:0,
      liveProcessedAssistantCount:0,
      liveLongCursor:0,
      lastSeenAssistantCount:0,
      lastSeenAssistantMessageId:'',
      lastSeenMessageId:'',
      charName:'',
      userName:'',
      stagePrompt:defaultStagePrompt(),
      longPrompt:defaultLongPrompt(),
      historyPrompt:defaultHistoryPrompt(),
      basicMemories:[],
      stageSummaries:[],
      longMemories:[],
      historyPatches:[],
      scanHits:[],
      refinedRanges:[],
      archiveLorebookId:0,
      archiveLorebookName:'',
      archiveLorebookAttached:false,
      runtimeLorebookId:0,
      runtimeLorebookName:'',
      runtimeLorebookAttached:false,
      lastSyncAt:'',
      unsynced:false,
      unsyncedReason:'',
      debugStorePrompts:false
    };
  }


  function makeBasic(r,i){
    r=r||{};
    return {
      id:trim(r.id)||uid(),
      title:trim(r.title||r.name||('基础记忆 '+(i+1))),
      text:String(r.text!=null?r.text:(r.content!=null?r.content:'')),
      createdAt:trim(r.createdAt||now()),
      enabled:(typeof r.enabled==='boolean'?r.enabled:true),
      sourceType:trim(r.sourceType||'manual'),
      sourceLabel:trim(r.sourceLabel||'')
    };
  }

  function makeStage(r){
    r=r||{};
    var a1=Math.max(0,int(r.assistantFrom,int(r.floorFrom,0)));
    var a2=Math.max(0,int(r.assistantTo,int(r.floorTo,0)));
    if(!a1&&a2)a1=a2;
    if(!a2&&a1)a2=a1;
    return {
      id:trim(r.id)||uid(),
      assistantFrom:a1,
      assistantTo:a2,
      messageFromId:trim(r.messageFromId||''),
      messageToId:trim(r.messageToId||''),
      createdAt:trim(r.createdAt||now()),
      anchors:normalizeAnchors(arr(r.anchors)?r.anchors:extractAnchorsFromText(r.text||'')),
      text:String(r.text||''),
      promptUsed:trim(r.promptUsed||''),
      sourceMode:(trim(r.sourceMode)==='backfill-fine'?'backfill-fine':'live')
    };
  }

  function makeLong(r){
    r=r||{};
    var a1=Math.max(0,int(r.assistantFrom,int(r.floorFrom,0)));
    var a2=Math.max(0,int(r.assistantTo,int(r.floorTo,0)));
    if(!a1&&a2)a1=a2;
    if(!a2&&a1)a2=a1;
    return {
      id:trim(r.id)||uid(),
      assistantFrom:a1,
      assistantTo:a2,
      summaryFrom:Math.max(0,int(r.summaryFrom,0)),
      summaryTo:Math.max(0,int(r.summaryTo,0)),
      createdAt:trim(r.createdAt||now()),
      anchors:normalizeAnchors(arr(r.anchors)?r.anchors:extractAnchorsFromText(r.text||'')),
      text:String(r.text||''),
      promptUsed:trim(r.promptUsed||''),
      sourceMode:(trim(r.sourceMode)==='backfill-fine'?'backfill-fine':'live')
    };
  }

  function makeHistory(r){
    r=r||{};
    var a1=Math.max(0,int(r.assistantFrom,int(r.floorFrom,0)));
    var a2=Math.max(0,int(r.assistantTo,int(r.floorTo,0)));
    if(!a1&&a2)a1=a2;
    if(!a2&&a1)a2=a1;
    return {
      id:trim(r.id)||uid(),
      assistantFrom:a1,
      assistantTo:a2,
      messageFromId:trim(r.messageFromId||''),
      messageToId:trim(r.messageToId||''),
      createdAt:trim(r.createdAt||now()),
      anchors:normalizeAnchors(arr(r.anchors)?r.anchors:extractAnchorsFromText(r.text||'')),
      text:String(r.text||''),
      promptUsed:trim(r.promptUsed||''),
      status:(trim(r.status)==='refined'?'refined':'active'),
      refinedBy:trim(r.refinedBy||'')
    };
  }

  function makeHit(r){
    r=r||{};
    var type=trim(r.archiveType||'');
    if(type==='segment')type='long';
    if(!/^(stage|long|history)$/.test(type))type='long';
    return {
      id:trim(r.id)||uid(),
      archiveType:type,
      archiveId:trim(r.archiveId||''),
      assistantFrom:Math.max(0,int(r.assistantFrom,int(r.floorFrom,0))),
      assistantTo:Math.max(0,int(r.assistantTo,int(r.floorTo,0))),
      pickedAtAssistantCount:Math.max(0,int(r.pickedAtAssistantCount,0)),
      expireAfterAssistantCount:Math.max(0,int(r.expireAfterAssistantCount,0)),
      score:num(r.score,0),
      active:(typeof r.active==='boolean'?r.active:true)
    };
  }

    function norm(raw){
    var s=defState(),i;
    if(!raw||typeof raw!=='object')return s;

    s.boundChatId=trim(raw.boundChatId||raw.chatId||'');

    if(typeof raw.started==='boolean')s.started=raw.started;
    s.stageEveryL=Math.max(1,int(raw.stageEveryL,int(raw.threshold,s.stageEveryL)));
    s.longEveryStage=Math.max(1,int(raw.longEveryStage,int(raw.summariesPerSegment,s.longEveryStage)));
    s.recentStageCount=Math.max(1,int(raw.recentStageCount,int(raw.runtimeRecentSummaryCount,s.recentStageCount)));
    s.longInjectionMode=(trim(raw.longInjectionMode)==='recent'?'recent':'all');
    s.longInjectionCount=Math.max(1,int(raw.longInjectionCount,s.longInjectionCount));
    if(typeof raw.scanMemoryDetails==='boolean')s.scanMemoryDetails=raw.scanMemoryDetails;
    else if(typeof raw.autoRecall==='boolean')s.scanMemoryDetails=raw.autoRecall;
    s.scanMemoryLimit=Math.max(1,int(raw.scanMemoryLimit,int(raw.recallLimit,s.scanMemoryLimit)));
    s.scanMemoryHoldRounds=Math.max(1,int(raw.scanMemoryHoldRounds,int(raw.recallHoldTurns,s.scanMemoryHoldRounds)));
    s.coarseTargetL=Math.max(20,int(raw.coarseTargetL,int(raw.coarseTargetFloors,s.coarseTargetL)));
    s.coarseMinL=Math.max(10,int(raw.coarseMinL,int(raw.coarseMinFloors,s.coarseMinL)));
    s.coarseMaxL=Math.max(s.coarseMinL,int(raw.coarseMaxL,int(raw.coarseMaxFloors,s.coarseMaxL)));
    s.liveBaselineAssistantCount=Math.max(0,int(raw.liveBaselineAssistantCount,int(raw.baselineAssistantCount,0)));
    s.liveProcessedAssistantCount=Math.max(0,int(raw.liveProcessedAssistantCount,int(raw.lastSummarizedAssistantCount,0)));
    s.liveLongCursor=Math.max(0,int(raw.liveLongCursor,int(raw.lastSegmentSummaryIndex,0)));
    s.lastSeenAssistantCount=Math.max(0,int(raw.lastSeenAssistantCount,s.liveProcessedAssistantCount));
    s.lastSeenAssistantMessageId=trim(raw.lastSeenAssistantMessageId||'');
    s.lastSeenMessageId=trim(raw.lastSeenMessageId||'');
    s.charName=trim(raw.charName||'');
    s.userName=trim(raw.userName||'');
    if(typeof raw.stagePrompt==='string'&&trim(raw.stagePrompt))s.stagePrompt=raw.stagePrompt;
    if(typeof raw.longPrompt==='string'&&trim(raw.longPrompt))s.longPrompt=raw.longPrompt;
    else if(typeof raw.segmentPrompt==='string'&&trim(raw.segmentPrompt))s.longPrompt=raw.segmentPrompt;
    if(typeof raw.historyPrompt==='string'&&trim(raw.historyPrompt))s.historyPrompt=raw.historyPrompt;

    if(arr(raw.basicMemories))for(i=0;i<raw.basicMemories.length;i++)s.basicMemories.push(makeBasic(raw.basicMemories[i],i));
    else if(arr(raw.seedMemories))for(i=0;i<raw.seedMemories.length;i++)s.basicMemories.push(makeBasic(raw.seedMemories[i],i));

    if(arr(raw.stageSummaries))for(i=0;i<raw.stageSummaries.length;i++)s.stageSummaries.push(makeStage(raw.stageSummaries[i]));
    else if(arr(raw.summaries))for(i=0;i<raw.summaries.length;i++)s.stageSummaries.push(makeStage(raw.summaries[i]));

    if(arr(raw.longMemories))for(i=0;i<raw.longMemories.length;i++)s.longMemories.push(makeLong(raw.longMemories[i]));
    else if(arr(raw.segments))for(i=0;i<raw.segments.length;i++)s.longMemories.push(makeLong(raw.segments[i]));

    if(arr(raw.historyPatches))for(i=0;i<raw.historyPatches.length;i++)s.historyPatches.push(makeHistory(raw.historyPatches[i]));
    else if(arr(raw.historyCards))for(i=0;i<raw.historyCards.length;i++)s.historyPatches.push(makeHistory(raw.historyCards[i]));

    if(arr(raw.scanHits))for(i=0;i<raw.scanHits.length;i++)s.scanHits.push(makeHit(raw.scanHits[i]));
    else if(arr(raw.recalledItems))for(i=0;i<raw.recalledItems.length;i++)s.scanHits.push(makeHit(raw.recalledItems[i]));

    s.refinedRanges=arr(raw.refinedRanges)?raw.refinedRanges.slice():[];
    s.archiveLorebookId=Math.max(0,int(raw.archiveLorebookId,0));
    s.archiveLorebookName=trim(raw.archiveLorebookName||'');
    s.archiveLorebookAttached=!!raw.archiveLorebookAttached;
    s.runtimeLorebookId=Math.max(0,int(raw.runtimeLorebookId,0));
    s.runtimeLorebookName=trim(raw.runtimeLorebookName||'');
    s.runtimeLorebookAttached=!!raw.runtimeLorebookAttached;
    s.lastSyncAt=trim(raw.lastSyncAt||raw.lastRuntimeSyncAt||raw.lastArchiveSyncAt||'');
    s.unsynced=!!raw.unsynced;
    s.unsyncedReason=trim(raw.unsyncedReason||'');
    s.debugStorePrompts=!!raw.debugStorePrompts;

    if(s.liveProcessedAssistantCount<s.liveBaselineAssistantCount)s.liveProcessedAssistantCount=s.liveBaselineAssistantCount;
    if(s.lastSeenAssistantCount<s.liveProcessedAssistantCount)s.lastSeenAssistantCount=s.liveProcessedAssistantCount;
    if(s.coarseTargetL<s.coarseMinL)s.coarseTargetL=s.coarseMinL;
    if(s.coarseTargetL>s.coarseMaxL)s.coarseTargetL=s.coarseMaxL;

    return s;
  }

  function stateLooksLikeCurrentChat(raw,chatId){
    raw=raw&&typeof raw==='object'?raw:null;
    chatId=String(chatId||'');
    if(!raw)return false;

    var bound=trim(raw.boundChatId||'');
    if(bound)return bound===chatId;

    var marker='聊天'+chatId;
    if(chatId&&trim(raw.archiveLorebookName||'').indexOf(marker)>=0)return true;
    if(chatId&&trim(raw.runtimeLorebookName||'').indexOf(marker)>=0)return true;

    return false;
  }

  function bindStateToChat(raw,chatId){
    var s=norm(raw);
    s.boundChatId=String(chatId||'');
    return s;
  }

  function sanitizeLoadedState(raw,chatId){
    raw=raw&&typeof raw==='object'?raw:null;
    chatId=String(chatId||'');
    if(!raw)return bindStateToChat(defState(),chatId);

    var bound=trim(raw.boundChatId||'');
    var aName=trim(raw.archiveLorebookName||'');
    var rName=trim(raw.runtimeLorebookName||'');
    var marker='聊天'+chatId;

    if(bound&&chatId&&bound!==chatId){
      return bindStateToChat(defState(),chatId);
    }

    if(!bound&&chatId){
      if((/聊天\d+/.test(aName)&&aName.indexOf(marker)<0)||
         (/聊天\d+/.test(rName)&&rName.indexOf(marker)<0)){
        return bindStateToChat(defState(),chatId);
      }
    }

    return bindStateToChat(raw,chatId);
  }

    state.runtimeLorebookName='';

    async function saveState(state){
    var info=await getCurrentChatInfo();
    state=bindStateToChat(state,info.chatId);
    try{
      if(window.tavo&&typeof tavo.set==='function')await tavo.set(STORE_KEY,state,'chat');
    }catch(e){console.error(e)}
    try{localStorage.setItem(info.localKey,JSON.stringify(state))}catch(_){}
    return state;
  }


    async function loadState(){
    var got=null,i,info=await getCurrentChatInfo(),legacy=null;
    try{
      if(window.tavo&&typeof tavo.get==='function'){
        got=await tavo.get(STORE_KEY,'chat');
        if(got&&typeof got==='object')return sanitizeLoadedState(got,info.chatId);

        for(i=0;i<OLD_KEYS.length;i++){
          got=await tavo.get(OLD_KEYS[i],'chat');
          if(got&&typeof got==='object'){
            got=sanitizeLoadedState(got,info.chatId);
            await saveState(got);
            return got;
          }
        }
      }
    }catch(e){console.error(e)}

    try{
      got=localStorage.getItem(info.localKey);
      if(got)return sanitizeLoadedState(JSON.parse(got),info.chatId);
    }catch(e2){console.error(e2)}

    try{
      legacy=localStorage.getItem(STORE_KEY);
      if(legacy){
        got=JSON.parse(legacy);
        if(stateLooksLikeCurrentChat(got,info.chatId)){
          got=sanitizeLoadedState(got,info.chatId);
          await saveState(got);
          return got;
        }
      }
    }catch(e3){console.error(e3)}

    return bindStateToChat(defState(),info.chatId);
  }

  async function fullReloadMessages(cache,count){
    cache=cache||messageCacheHost();
    count=Math.max(0,int(count,0));

    if(!count){
      cache.msgs=[];
      cache.count=0;
      cache.tailIds=[];
      cache.assistantCount=0;
      cache.assistantFloorById={};
      return [];
    }

    var x=await fetchMessageRange(0,count-1);
    cache.msgs=arr(x)?x:[];
    refreshMessageCacheTail(cache);
    rebuildAssistantFloorCache(cache);
    return cache.msgs.slice();

    async function getAssistantFloorByMessageId(messageId){
    var cache=messageCacheHost();
    var id=trim(messageId||'');
    var floor=0;

    if(!id)return 0;

    floor=int(cache.assistantFloorById&&cache.assistantFloorById[id],0);
    if(floor>0)return floor;

    await getAllMessages(false);
    floor=int(cache.assistantFloorById&&cache.assistantFloorById[id],0);

    await getAllMessages(true);
    return int(cache.assistantFloorById&&cache.assistantFloorById[id],0);

  function getAssistantSlots(msgs){

  function latestMessageId(msgs){

  function assistantMessageIndexByCount(assists,count){
    count=int(count,0);
    if(count<=0||count>assists.length)return-1;
    return assists[count-1].messageIndex;
  }

  function assistantCountAtIndex(assists,msgIndex){
    var i,c=0;
    for(i=0;i<assists.length;i++){
      if(assists[i].messageIndex<=msgIndex)c=assists[i].assistantIndex;
      else break;
    }
    return c;
  }

  function buildDialogueByAssistantRange(msgs,assists,fromL,toL,names){
    fromL=Math.max(1,int(fromL,1));
    toL=Math.max(fromL,int(toL,fromL));

    var startMsg=0;
    var endMsg=-1;
    var prev=assistantMessageIndexByCount(assists,fromL-1);
    var end=assistantMessageIndexByCount(assists,toL);
    if(prev>=0)startMsg=prev+1;
    if(end<0)return null;
    endMsg=end;

    var lines=[],i,m,content,roleName,curL;
    for(i=startMsg;i<=endMsg&&i<msgs.length;i++){
      m=msgs[i];
      if(!m)continue;
      content=String(m.content!=null?m.content:'');
      if(m.role==='system'){
        lines.push('[系统] '+content);
        continue;
      }
      if(m.role==='assistant'){
        curL=assistantCountAtIndex(assists,i);
        roleName=(names&&names.charName)||'角色';
        lines.push('['+curL+'L｜'+roleName+'] '+content);
      }else if(m.role==='user'){
        roleName=(names&&names.userName)||'用户';
        lines.push('['+roleName+'] '+content);
      }else{
        lines.push('['+(m.role||'消息')+'] '+content);
      }
    }

    return {
      assistantFrom:fromL,
      assistantTo:toL,
      messageFromId:(startMsg>=0&&msgs[startMsg]&&msgs[startMsg].id!=null)?String(msgs[startMsg].id):'',
      messageToId:(endMsg>=0&&msgs[endMsg]&&msgs[endMsg].id!=null)?String(msgs[endMsg].id):'',
      dialogue:lines.join('\n\n')
    };
  }

  function serializeStages(list){

  function buildLongPrompt(state,names,list){

  function sortByAssistant(list){
    return (arr(list)?list:[]).slice().sort(function(a,b){
      var ax=int(a&&a.assistantTo,0),bx=int(b&&b.assistantTo,0);
      if(ax!==bx)return ax-bx;
      return int(a&&a.assistantFrom,0)-int(b&&b.assistantFrom,0);
    });
  }

  function recentLiveStages(state){
    var list=sortByAssistant((state.stageSummaries||[]).filter(function(x){
      return x&&trim(x.sourceMode||'')==='live';
    }));
    var keep=Math.max(1,int(state.recentStageCount,3));
    return list.slice(Math.max(0,list.length-keep));
  }

  function livePendingStages(state){
    var live=sortByAssistant((state.stageSummaries||[]).filter(function(x){
      return x&&trim(x.sourceMode||'')==='live';
    }));
    var cutoff=0,i;
    for(i=0;i<(state.longMemories||[]).length;i++){
      if(state.longMemories[i]&&trim(state.longMemories[i].sourceMode||'')==='live'){
        cutoff=Math.max(cutoff,int(state.longMemories[i].assistantTo,0));
      }
    }
    return live.filter(function(x){
      return int(x.assistantTo,0)>cutoff;
    });
  }

  function injectedLongs(state){
    var list=sortByAssistant(state.longMemories);
    if(trim(state.longInjectionMode)==='recent'){
      var keep=Math.max(1,int(state.longInjectionCount,1));
      return list.slice(Math.max(0,list.length-keep));
    }
    return list;
  }

  function activeHits(state,currentA){
    var list=arr(state.scanHits)?state.scanHits:[],out=[],i,it;
    for(i=0;i<list.length;i++){
      it=list[i];
      if(!it||it.active===false)continue;
      if(int(it.expireAfterAssistantCount,0)>0&&currentA>int(it.expireAfterAssistantCount,0))continue;
      out.push(it);
    }
    return out;
  }

  function pruneHits(state,currentA){
    var list=arr(state.scanHits)?state.scanHits:[],out=[],i,it,changed=false;
    for(i=0;i<list.length;i++){
      it=list[i];
      if(!it)continue;
      if(it.active===false){changed=true;continue}
      if(int(it.expireAfterAssistantCount,0)>0&&currentA>int(it.expireAfterAssistantCount,0)){changed=true;continue}
      out.push(it);
    }
    if(changed)state.scanHits=out;
    return changed;
  }

  function textWindow(msgs,maxVisible){
    maxVisible=Math.max(1,int(maxVisible,6));
    var out=[],i,m;
    for(i=msgs.length-1;i>=0&&out.length<maxVisible;i--){
      m=msgs[i];
      if(!m||m.role==='system')continue;
      out.unshift(String(m.content||''));
    }
    return trim(out.join('\n'));
  }

  function hasRecallSignal(text){
    return /(上次|那次|之前|还记得|第一次|后来|当时|以前|曾经|还提过|说过|那天|那晚)/.test(String(text||''));
  }

  function pickScanCandidates(state){
    var recent=recentLiveStages(state),recentIds={},i,out=[],x;
    for(i=0;i<recent.length;i++)recentIds[recent[i].id]=1;

    for(i=0;i<(state.stageSummaries||[]).length;i++){
      x=state.stageSummaries[i];
      if(x&&!recentIds[x.id]&&trim(x.text||'')){
        out.push({
          type:'stage',
          record:x,
          anchors:normalizeAnchors(x.anchors),
          text:x.text,
          assistantFrom:x.assistantFrom,
          assistantTo:x.assistantTo
        });
      }
    }
    for(i=0;i<(state.longMemories||[]).length;i++){
      x=state.longMemories[i];
      if(x&&trim(x.text||'')){
        out.push({
          type:'long',
          record:x,
          anchors:normalizeAnchors(x.anchors),
          text:x.text,
          assistantFrom:x.assistantFrom,
          assistantTo:x.assistantTo
        });
      }
    }
    for(i=0;i<(state.historyPatches||[]).length;i++){
      x=state.historyPatches[i];
      if(x&&trim(x.text||'')&&trim(x.status||'')!=='refined'){
        out.push({
          type:'history',
          record:x,
          anchors:normalizeAnchors(x.anchors),
          text:x.text,
          assistantFrom:x.assistantFrom,
          assistantTo:x.assistantTo
        });
      }
    }
    return out;
  }

  function scoreCandidate(recentText,c){
    recentText=lower(recentText||'');
    if(!trim(recentText)||!c)return 0;
    var score=0,i,a;
    if(c.type==='stage')score+=34;
    else if(c.type==='long')score+=24;
    else if(c.type==='history')score+=14;
    if(hasRecallSignal(recentText))score+=8;
    for(i=0;i<c.anchors.length;i++){
      a=lower(c.anchors[i]);
      if(!a||a.length<2)continue;
      if(recentText.indexOf(a)>=0)score+=(a.length>=4?15:9);
    }
    return score;
  }

  async function refreshScanHits(manual){
    var state=await loadState();
    var msgs=await getAllMessages();
    var assists=getAssistantSlots(msgs);
    var currentA=assists.length;
    var changed=pruneHits(state,currentA);
    var recent=textWindow(msgs,6);

    if(!manual&&!state.scanMemoryDetails){
      if(changed)await saveState(state);
      return state;
    }

    var list=pickScanCandidates(state),scored=[],best={},hits=[],i,c,s,key,names;
    for(i=0;i<list.length;i++){
      c=list[i];
      s=scoreCandidate(recent,c);
      if(s<22)continue;
      key=c.type+'::'+String(c.record&&c.record.id||'');
      if(best[key])continue;
      best[key]=1;
      scored.push({
        archiveType:c.type,
        archiveId:String(c.record.id||''),
        assistantFrom:c.assistantFrom,
        assistantTo:c.assistantTo,
        score:s
      });
    }

    scored.sort(function(a,b){
      if(b.score!==a.score)return b.score-a.score;
      return int(b.assistantTo,0)-int(a.assistantTo,0);
    });

    scored=scored.slice(0,Math.max(1,int(state.scanMemoryLimit,3)));
    for(i=0;i<scored.length;i++){
      hits.push({
        id:uid(),
        archiveType:scored[i].archiveType,
        archiveId:scored[i].archiveId,
        assistantFrom:scored[i].assistantFrom,
        assistantTo:scored[i].assistantTo,
        pickedAtAssistantCount:currentA,
        expireAfterAssistantCount:currentA+Math.max(1,int(state.scanMemoryHoldRounds,2)),
        score:scored[i].score,
        active:true
      });
    }

    if(JSON.stringify(hits)!==JSON.stringify(activeHits(state,currentA))){
      state.scanHits=hits;
      changed=true;
    }

    if(changed){
      markUnsynced(state,'扫描记忆细节结果变化');
      await saveState(state);
      try{
        names=await getChatNames();
        state=await trySync(state,names,false);
      }catch(_){}
    }

    return state;
  }

      caseSensitive:false,
      matchWholeWord:true,
      injectionPosition:'lorebookBefore',
      injectionRole:'system',
      probability:100,
      sticky:0,
      cooldown:0,
      delay:0
    };
  }

  function longEntryText(r){
    return trim(['【长期记忆｜'+rangeLabelL(r.assistantFrom,r.assistantTo)+'】','',trim(r.text||'')].join('\n'));

    return trim(['【历史补档｜'+rangeLabelL(r.assistantFrom,r.assistantTo)+'】','',trim(r.text||'')].join('\n'));

  function hitEntryText(item,resolved){

      '【记忆细节参考｜'+rangeLabelL(item.assistantFrom,item.assistantTo)+'】',

  function makeBasicEntry(r){return makeEntry('mms6-basic-'+String(r.id||uid()),'基础记忆｜'+(r.title||'未命名'),basicEntryText(r),r.enabled!==false)}
  function makeStageEntry(r){return makeEntry('mms6-stage-'+String(r.id||uid()),'阶段总结｜'+rangeLabelL(r.assistantFrom,r.assistantTo),stageEntryText(r),true)}
  function makeLongEntry(r){return makeEntry('mms6-long-'+String(r.id||uid()),'长期记忆｜'+rangeLabelL(r.assistantFrom,r.assistantTo),longEntryText(r),true)}
  function makeHistoryEntry(r){return makeEntry('mms6-history-'+String(r.id||uid()),'历史补档｜'+rangeLabelL(r.assistantFrom,r.assistantTo),historyEntryText(r),true)}
  function makeHitEntry(item,resolved,i){return makeEntry('mms6-hit-'+String(i||0)+'-'+String(item.id||uid()),'记忆细节参考｜'+rangeLabelL(item.assistantFrom,item.assistantTo),hitEntryText(item,resolved),true)}

  function resolveHitSource(state,item){
    var id=trim(item&&item.archiveId||''),i;
    if(!id)return null;
    if(item.archiveType==='stage'){
      for(i=0;i<(state.stageSummaries||[]).length;i++){
        if(state.stageSummaries[i]&&state.stageSummaries[i].id===id)return{label:'阶段总结',record:state.stageSummaries[i]};
      }
      return null;
    }
    if(item.archiveType==='history'){
      for(i=0;i<(state.historyPatches||[]).length;i++){
        if(state.historyPatches[i]&&state.historyPatches[i].id===id)return{label:'历史补档',record:state.historyPatches[i]};
      }
      return null;
    }
    for(i=0;i<(state.longMemories||[]).length;i++){
      if(state.longMemories[i]&&state.longMemories[i].id===id)return{label:'长期记忆',record:state.longMemories[i]};
    }
    return null;
  }

  function buildArchiveEntries(state){
    var out=[],i;
    for(i=0;i<(state.basicMemories||[]).length;i++)if(state.basicMemories[i]&&trim(state.basicMemories[i].text||''))out.push(makeBasicEntry(state.basicMemories[i]));
    for(i=0;i<(state.stageSummaries||[]).length;i++)if(state.stageSummaries[i]&&trim(state.stageSummaries[i].text||''))out.push(makeStageEntry(state.stageSummaries[i]));
    for(i=0;i<(state.longMemories||[]).length;i++)if(state.longMemories[i]&&trim(state.longMemories[i].text||''))out.push(makeLongEntry(state.longMemories[i]));
    for(i=0;i<(state.historyPatches||[]).length;i++)if(state.historyPatches[i]&&trim(state.historyPatches[i].text||''))out.push(makeHistoryEntry(state.historyPatches[i]));
    return out;
  }

  function buildRuntimeEntries(state,currentA){
    var out=[],i,h,res;
    var basic=state.basicMemories||[];
    var longs=injectedLongs(state);
    var stages=recentLiveStages(state);
    var hits=activeHits(state,currentA);

    for(i=0;i<basic.length;i++)if(basic[i]&&basic[i].enabled!==false&&trim(basic[i].text||''))out.push(makeBasicEntry(basic[i]));
    for(i=0;i<longs.length;i++)if(longs[i]&&trim(longs[i].text||''))out.push(makeLongEntry(longs[i]));
    for(i=0;i<stages.length;i++)if(stages[i]&&trim(stages[i].text||''))out.push(makeStageEntry(stages[i]));
    for(i=0;i<hits.length;i++){
      h=hits[i];
      res=resolveHitSource(state,h);
      if(!res||!res.record||!trim(res.record.text||''))continue;
      out.push(makeHitEntry(h,res,i));
    }
    return out;
  }

  function lorebookName(chat,names,kind){
    var role=trim((names&&names.charName)||'角色');
    var chatId=(chat&&chat.id!=null)?chat.id:'当前';
    return '记忆V6｜'+role+'｜聊天'+String(chatId)+'｜'+(kind==='archive'?'档案书':'当前注入书');
  }

  function fpEntries(list,id){
    return JSON.stringify({
      lorebookId:id||0,
      entries:(arr(list)?list:[]).map(function(e){
        return {
          identifier:String(e.identifier||''),
          name:String(e.name||''),
          content:String(e.content||''),
          enabled:!!e.enabled
        };
      })
    });
  }

    async function ensureManagedLorebook(state,names,kind,forceAttach){
    var chat=await tavo.chat.current();
    if(!chat)throw new Error('当前没有聊天，无法创建记忆世界书');

    var prevBound=trim(state&&state.boundChatId||'');
    state=norm(state);

    var isArchive=(kind==='archive');
    var idKey=isArchive?'archiveLorebookId':'runtimeLorebookId';
    var nameKey=isArchive?'archiveLorebookName':'runtimeLorebookName';
    var attachedKey=isArchive?'archiveLorebookAttached':'runtimeLorebookAttached';
    var currentChatId=chat&&chat.id!=null?String(chat.id):'';
    var lb=null,found,i,idx=-1,newId,target;

    if(prevBound&&currentChatId&&prevBound!==currentChatId){
      state=clearManagedLorebookBinding(state);
    }

    state.boundChatId=currentChatId;
    target=state[nameKey]||lorebookName(chat,names,kind);

    if(state[idKey]){
      try{lb=await tavo.lorebook.get(state[idKey])}catch(_){}
    }

    if(!lb&&target){
      try{
        found=await tavo.lorebook.find(target,{match:'exact'});
        if(arr(found)&&found.length&&found[0]&&found[0].id!=null)lb=await tavo.lorebook.get(found[0].id);
      }catch(_){}
    }

    if(!lb){
      newId=await tavo.lorebook.create({name:lorebookName(chat,names,kind),entries:[]});
      lb=await tavo.lorebook.get(newId);
    }

    if(!lb||lb.id==null)throw new Error('记忆世界书创建失败');

    state[idKey]=lb.id;
    state[nameKey]=lb.name;
    chat.lorebooks=arr(chat.lorebooks)?chat.lorebooks.slice():[];

    for(i=0;i<chat.lorebooks.length;i++){
      if(chat.lorebooks[i]&&chat.lorebooks[i].id===lb.id){
        idx=i;
        break;
      }
    }

    if(isArchive){
      if(idx>=0){
        chat.lorebooks.splice(idx,1);
        await tavo.chat.update(chat);
      }
      state[attachedKey]=false;
    }else{
      if((!!forceAttach||!state[attachedKey])&&idx<0){
        chat.lorebooks.push({id:lb.id,name:lb.name});
        await tavo.chat.update(chat);
      }
      state[attachedKey]=true;
    }

    return{state:state,lorebook:lb};
  }


  async function syncMemoryBooks(state,names,forceAttachRuntime){
    var ensured=await ensureManagedLorebook(state,names,'archive',false);
    var lb=ensured.lorebook;
    state=ensured.state;
    var desired=buildArchiveEntries(state);
    var dfp=fpEntries(desired,lb.id);
    var cfp=fpEntries(lb.entries||[],lb.id);
    var fresh;

    if(dfp!==cfp){
      fresh=await tavo.lorebook.get(lb.id);
      fresh.entries=desired;
      await tavo.lorebook.update(fresh);
    }

    ensured=await ensureManagedLorebook(state,names,'runtime',!!forceAttachRuntime);
    lb=ensured.lorebook;
    state=ensured.state;
    desired=buildRuntimeEntries(state,state.lastSeenAssistantCount||0);
    dfp=fpEntries(desired,lb.id);
    cfp=fpEntries(lb.entries||[],lb.id);

    if(dfp!==cfp){
      fresh=await tavo.lorebook.get(lb.id);
      fresh.entries=desired;
      await tavo.lorebook.update(fresh);
    }

    state.lastSyncAt=now();
    state.unsynced=false;
    state.unsyncedReason='';
    await saveState(state);
    return state;
  }

  async function trySync(state,names,forceAttach){
    try{
      return await syncMemoryBooks(state,names,!!forceAttach);
    }catch(e){
      state.unsynced=true;
      state.unsyncedReason=clip(ferr(e),160);
      await saveState(state);
      throw e;
    }
  }

  function readUiIntoState(state){
    var n;
    n=q('[data-core-role="stage-every-l"]');if(n)state.stageEveryL=Math.max(1,int(n.value,state.stageEveryL));
    n=q('[data-core-role="long-every-stage"]');if(n)state.longEveryStage=Math.max(1,int(n.value,state.longEveryStage));
    n=q('[data-core-role="recent-stage-count"]');if(n)state.recentStageCount=Math.max(1,int(n.value,state.recentStageCount));
    n=q('[data-core-role="long-mode"]');if(n)state.longInjectionMode=(trim(n.value)==='recent'?'recent':'all');
    n=q('[data-core-role="long-count"]');if(n)state.longInjectionCount=Math.max(1,int(n.value,state.longInjectionCount));
    n=q('[data-core-role="scan-details"]');if(n)state.scanMemoryDetails=!!n.checked;
    n=q('[data-core-role="scan-limit"]');if(n)state.scanMemoryLimit=Math.max(1,int(n.value,state.scanMemoryLimit));
    n=q('[data-core-role="scan-hold"]');if(n)state.scanMemoryHoldRounds=Math.max(1,int(n.value,state.scanMemoryHoldRounds));
    n=q('[data-core-role="stage-prompt"]');if(n&&trim(n.value))state.stagePrompt=n.value;
    n=q('[data-core-role="long-prompt"]');if(n&&trim(n.value))state.longPrompt=n.value;
    n=q('[data-core-role="history-prompt"]');if(n&&trim(n.value))state.historyPrompt=n.value;
    if(!state.scanMemoryDetails)state.scanHits=[];
    return state;
  }

    var pendingLong=livePendingStages(state).length;
    var longRemain=state.started?Math.max(0,int(state.longEveryStage,4)-pendingLong):int(state.longEveryStage,4);

        '<div class="mms6-preview-block"><div class="mms6-kicker">基础记忆</div><div class="mms6-preview-text">当前启用 '+basicCount+' 条。</div></div>',

  async function runStage(manual){
    if(!acquire()){toast('当前已有任务在运行');return}
    shell.setPending('stage',manual?'正在生成阶段总结…':'正在自动生成阶段总结…');

    try{
      var state=await loadState();
      state=readUiIntoState(state);

      var msgs=await getAllMessages();
      var assists=getAssistantSlots(msgs);
      var currentA=assists.length;
      var names=await getChatNames();

      state.charName=names.charName;
      state.userName=names.userName;

      if(!state.started){
        if(manual)toast('先点“从当前开始”');
        await renderUI();
        return;
      }

      if(state.liveProcessedAssistantCount>currentA)state.liveProcessedAssistantCount=currentA;

      var pendingA=Math.max(0,currentA-state.liveProcessedAssistantCount);
      if(pendingA<=0){
        if(manual)toast('当前没有新的角色回复可总结');
        await renderUI();
        return;
      }

      var need=int(state.stageEveryL,24);
      var take=manual?Math.min(pendingA,need):need;
      if(!manual&&pendingA<need){
        await renderUI();
        return;
      }

      var fromL=state.liveProcessedAssistantCount+1;
      var toL=state.liveProcessedAssistantCount+take;
      var win=buildDialogueByAssistantRange(msgs,assists,fromL,toL,names);

      if(!win||!trim(win.dialogue)){
        if(manual)toast('没有可用于生成阶段总结的对话窗口');
        await renderUI();
        return;
      }

      var prompt=buildStagePrompt(state,names,win);
      var text=clean(await tavo.generate(prompt,{context:false}));
      if(!text)throw new Error('阶段总结结果为空');

      var rec={
        id:uid(),
        assistantFrom:fromL,
        assistantTo:toL,
        messageFromId:win.messageFromId,
        messageToId:win.messageToId,
        createdAt:now(),
        anchors:extractAnchorsFromText(text),
        text:text,
        promptUsed:state.debugStorePrompts?prompt:'',
        sourceMode:'live'
      };

      state.stageSummaries.push(rec);
      state.liveProcessedAssistantCount=toL;
      state.lastSeenAssistantCount=currentA;
      state.lastSeenAssistantMessageId=lastAssistantId(msgs);
      state.lastSeenMessageId=latestMessageId(msgs);
      markUnsynced(state,'新增 1 条阶段总结');

      await saveState(state);
      try{state=await trySync(state,names,false)}catch(e){console.error(e)}

      toast(manual?'已生成阶段总结':'已自动生成阶段总结');
      await renderUI();
    }catch(e){
      console.error(e);
      toast((manual?'手动':'自动')+'阶段总结失败：'+clip(ferr(e),120));
    }finally{
      release();
      shell.clearPending();
    }
  }

  async function runLong(manual){
    if(!acquire()){toast('当前已有任务在运行');return}
    shell.setPending('long',manual?'正在生成长期记忆…':'正在自动生成长期记忆…');

    try{
      var state=await loadState();
      state=readUiIntoState(state);
      var names=await getChatNames();

      state.charName=names.charName;
      state.userName=names.userName;

      if(!state.started){
        if(manual)toast('先点“从当前开始”');
        await renderUI();
        return;
      }

      var pending=livePendingStages(state);
      if(!pending.length){
        if(manual)toast('当前没有可用于生成长期记忆的阶段总结');
        await renderUI();
        return;
      }

      var need=Math.max(1,int(state.longEveryStage,4));
      if(!manual&&pending.length<need){
        await renderUI();
        return;
      }

      var useCount=manual?Math.min(pending.length,need):need;
      var useList=pending.slice(0,useCount);
      var prompt=buildLongPrompt(state,names,useList);
      var text=clean(await tavo.generate(prompt,{context:false}));
      if(!text)throw new Error('长期记忆结果为空');

      var rec={
        id:uid(),
        assistantFrom:int(useList[0].assistantFrom,0),
        assistantTo:int(useList[useList.length-1].assistantTo,0),
        summaryFrom:0,
        summaryTo:0,
        createdAt:now(),
        anchors:extractAnchorsFromText(text),
        text:text,
        promptUsed:state.debugStorePrompts?prompt:'',
        sourceMode:'live'
      };

      state.longMemories.push(rec);
      state.liveLongCursor=Math.max(0,int(state.liveLongCursor,0)+useList.length);
      markUnsynced(state,'新增 1 条长期记忆');

      await saveState(state);
      try{state=await trySync(state,names,false)}catch(e){console.error(e)}

      toast(manual?'已生成长期记忆':'已自动生成长期记忆');
      await renderUI();
    }catch(e){
      console.error(e);
      toast((manual?'手动':'自动')+'长期记忆失败：'+clip(ferr(e),120));
    }finally{
      release();
      shell.clearPending();
    }
  }

  function findRecordByTypeAndId(state,type,id){
    var i,list=[];
    if(type==='basic')list=state.basicMemories||[];
    else if(type==='stage')list=state.stageSummaries||[];
    else if(type==='long')list=state.longMemories||[];
    else if(type==='history')list=state.historyPatches||[];
    for(i=0;i<list.length;i++){
      if(list[i]&&trim(list[i].id||'')===trim(id||''))return list[i];
    }
    return null;
  }

  function bindDetailButtons(){
    var nodes=qa('[data-open-detail="1"]'),i,node;
    for(i=0;i<nodes.length;i++){
      node=nodes[i];
      if(node.getAttribute('data-core-direct-detail')==='1')continue;
      node.setAttribute('data-core-direct-detail','1');
      node.onclick=function(ev){
        try{
          if(ev){
            ev.preventDefault();
            ev.stopPropagation();
            if(ev.stopImmediatePropagation)ev.stopImmediatePropagation();
          }
        }catch(_){}
        var type=trim(this.getAttribute('data-rec-type')||'');
        var id=trim(this.getAttribute('data-rec-id')||'');
        if(type&&id)openDetail(type,id);
      };
    }
  }

  async function openDetail(type,id){
    var state=await loadState();
    var rec=findRecordByTypeAndId(state,type,id);
    var title='档案详情',meta='',body='';

    if(!rec)return;

    core.detailType=type;
    core.detailId=id;

    if(type==='basic'){
      title='基础记忆 · '+(rec.title||'未命名');
      meta='类型：基础记忆\n范围：长期常驻\n时间：'+(rec.createdAt||'暂无');
      body=rec.text||'';
    }else if(type==='stage'){
      title='阶段总结 · '+rangeLabelL(rec.assistantFrom,rec.assistantTo);
      meta='类型：阶段总结\n范围：'+rangeLabelL(rec.assistantFrom,rec.assistantTo)+'\n时间：'+(rec.createdAt||'暂无');
      body=rec.text||'';
    }else if(type==='long'){
      title='长期记忆 · '+rangeLabelL(rec.assistantFrom,rec.assistantTo);
      meta='类型：长期记忆\n范围：'+rangeLabelL(rec.assistantFrom,rec.assistantTo)+'\n时间：'+(rec.createdAt||'暂无');
      body=rec.text||'';
    }else if(type==='history'){
      title='历史补档 · '+rangeLabelL(rec.assistantFrom,rec.assistantTo);
      meta='类型：历史补档\n范围：'+rangeLabelL(rec.assistantFrom,rec.assistantTo)+'\n时间：'+(rec.createdAt||'暂无');
      body=rec.text||'';
    }

    shell.setDetail({
      open:true,
      openTab:'archive',
      title:title,
      meta:meta,
      body:body,
      showDelete:true
    });
  }

  function bindCoreRoot(){
    if(!shell.root||shell.root.getAttribute('data-core-bound')==='1')return;
    shell.root.setAttribute('data-core-bound','1');
    shell.root.addEventListener('click',function(e){
      var node=closest(e.target,'[data-open-detail="1"]');
      if(!node)return;
      var type=trim(node.getAttribute('data-rec-type')||'');
      var id=trim(node.getAttribute('data-rec-id')||'');
      if(type&&id)openDetail(type,id);
    });
  }

  function removeHitRefs(state,type,id){
    var list=arr(state.scanHits)?state.scanHits:[],out=[],i,it;
    for(i=0;i<list.length;i++){
      it=list[i];
      if(!it)continue;
      if(trim(it.archiveType||'')===trim(type||'')&&trim(it.archiveId||'')===trim(id||''))continue;
      out.push(it);
    }
    state.scanHits=out;
  }

  async function deleteDetail(){
    if(!core.detailType||!core.detailId){
      toast('当前没有可删除的档案');
      return;
    }

    if(!window.confirm('确认删除这条'+typeLabel(core.detailType)+'吗？\n删除后会同步到记忆世界书，且无法撤销。'))return;

    if(!acquire()){toast('当前已有任务在运行');return}
    shell.setPending('sync','正在删除档案并同步…');

    try{
      var state=await loadState(),names=await getChatNames(),i,removed=false;

      if(core.detailType==='basic'){
        for(i=0;i<state.basicMemories.length;i++){
          if(state.basicMemories[i]&&trim(state.basicMemories[i].id||'')===core.detailId){
            state.basicMemories.splice(i,1);
            removed=true;
            break;
          }
        }
      }else if(core.detailType==='stage'){
        for(i=0;i<state.stageSummaries.length;i++){
          if(state.stageSummaries[i]&&trim(state.stageSummaries[i].id||'')===core.detailId){
            state.stageSummaries.splice(i,1);
            removeHitRefs(state,'stage',core.detailId);
            removed=true;
            break;
          }
        }
      }else if(core.detailType==='long'){
        for(i=0;i<state.longMemories.length;i++){
          if(state.longMemories[i]&&trim(state.longMemories[i].id||'')===core.detailId){
            state.longMemories.splice(i,1);
            removeHitRefs(state,'long',core.detailId);
            removed=true;
            break;
          }
        }
      }else if(core.detailType==='history'){
        for(i=0;i<state.historyPatches.length;i++){
          if(state.historyPatches[i]&&trim(state.historyPatches[i].id||'')===core.detailId){
            state.historyPatches.splice(i,1);
            removeHitRefs(state,'history',core.detailId);
            removed=true;
            break;
          }
        }
      }

      if(!removed){
        toast('目标档案不存在或已被删除');
        await renderUI();
        return;
      }

      markUnsynced(state,'删除了 1 条'+typeLabel(core.detailType));
      await saveState(state);
      try{state=await trySync(state,names,false)}catch(e){console.error(e)}

      core.detailType='';
      core.detailId='';
      shell.closeDetail();
      toast('已删除，并已尝试同步到记忆世界书');
      await renderUI();
    }catch(e){
      console.error(e);
      toast('删除失败：'+clip(ferr(e),120));
    }finally{
      release();
      shell.clearPending();
    }
  }
  async function autoCheck(){
    if(core.autoChecking)return;
    core.autoChecking=true;
    try{
      if(globalLock.busy)return;

      var state=await loadState();
      var msgs=await getAllMessages(false);
      var assists=getAssistantSlots(msgs);
      var currentA=assists.length;
      var panelOpen=!!(shell&&shell.root&&shell.root.classList&&shell.root.classList.contains('mms6-open'));

      try{
        if(shell&&typeof shell.setTriggerMeta==='function'){
          shell.setTriggerMeta((currentA>0?currentA:0)+'L');
        }
      }catch(_){}

      var latestAid=lastAssistantId(msgs);
      var latestMid=latestMessageId(msgs);

      var assistantChanged=!!latestAid&&state.lastSeenAssistantMessageId!==latestAid;
      var messageChanged=!!latestMid&&state.lastSeenMessageId!==latestMid;

      if(!state.started){
        if(panelOpen&&(assistantChanged||messageChanged)){
          state.lastSeenAssistantCount=currentA;
          state.lastSeenAssistantMessageId=latestAid;
          state.lastSeenMessageId=latestMid;
          await saveState(state);
          await renderUI();
        }
        return;
      }

      if(!assistantChanged&&!messageChanged)return;

      state.lastSeenAssistantCount=currentA;
      state.lastSeenAssistantMessageId=latestAid;
      state.lastSeenMessageId=latestMid;
      await saveState(state);

      var pendingA=Math.max(0,currentA-Math.max(0,int(state.liveProcessedAssistantCount,0)));
      if(assistantChanged&&pendingA>=Math.max(1,int(state.stageEveryL,24))){
        await runStage(false);
        state=await loadState();
        if(livePendingStages(state).length>=Math.max(1,int(state.longEveryStage,4))){
          await runLong(false);
        }
        return;
      }

      if(messageChanged&&state.scanMemoryDetails){
        try{
          await refreshScanHits(false);
        }catch(e){
          console.error(e);
        }
      }

      if(panelOpen){
        await renderUI();
      }
    }finally{
      core.autoChecking=false;
    }
  }

      



  async function pulse(){
    bindCoreRoot();
    await renderUI();
    try{await autoCheck()}catch(e){console.error(e)}
  }

    function schedulePassiveRefresh(){
    clearTimeout(core.kickTimer);
    core.kickTimer=setTimeout(function(){
      try{
        autoCheck().catch(console.error);
        if(shell&&shell.root&&shell.root.classList.contains('mms6-open')){
          renderUI().catch(console.error);
        }
      }catch(e){console.error(e)}
    },80);
  }

  core.notifyFreshInstance=function(){
    try{
      bindCoreRoot();
      schedulePassiveRefresh();
    }catch(e){console.error(e)}
  };


  shell.registerAction('start',startFromCurrent);
  shell.registerAction('runStage',function(){runStage(true);});
  shell.registerAction('runLong',function(){runLong(true);});
  shell.registerAction('syncMemory',syncMemory);
  shell.registerAction('scanMemory',scanMemory);
  shell.registerAction('saveSettings',saveSettings);
  shell.registerAction('deleteDetail',deleteDetail);
  shell.registerAction('reopenSplash',function(){shell.reopenSplash();});
  shell.registerAction('exportArchive',function(){exportArchive();});

  shell.on('open',function(){renderUI().catch(console.error);});
  shell.on('tab',function(){renderUI().catch(console.error);});
  shell.on('archiveTab',function(){renderUI().catch(console.error);});
  shell.on('promptTab',function(){renderUI().catch(console.error);});

  core.timer=setInterval(function(){
    try{autoCheck()}catch(e){console.error(e)}
  },1800);

  pulse();
}

bootCore(0);
})();
</script>
